Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Powder recycling for electron beam powder bed fusion of TiAl alloy☆

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: Powder nominal composition: Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb (at.%). Powder Al depletion from 48.43 at.% (R0) to 46.31 at.% (R70). O uptake from 560 ppm to 2000 ppm over 70 cycles.

Process_Text.original: EIGA (Electrode Induction Gas Atomization) powder production, 53-150 μm particle size. EB-PBF (Electron Beam Powder Bed Fusion) building using Qbeam S200 equipment (60 kV accelerating voltage). Building temperature 900-1100°C, powder bed preheating 900-1150°C, layer thickness 50 μm. Melting strategy: Hatching with line offsets 0.1 mm. EA (Energy Area) values: 1.80-2.24 J/mm². Average single furnace building time ~20 h. Thin-walled samples built with same process parameters.
Process_Text.simplified: EIGA powder, EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer, 900-1100°C build temp)

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), and dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along lamellar colony boundaries. Distinct γ bands with annealed twins observed in S0. β₀/B₂ phase primarily distributed near grain boundaries. LAGB 5.2%, HAGB 94.8%. Twin boundaries of γ [110]70° ~12.5%. KAM values up to 4.97.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ grains + fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ); β₀/B₂ precipitates at grain boundaries; γ bands with twins

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness (thin-walled)
Properties_Info.Note: Yield strength increased with recycling cycles

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness (thin-walled)
Properties_Info.Note: S0 value; tensile strength ranged 682-750 MPa across all samples

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness (thin-walled)
Properties_Info.Note: S0 value; plasticity initially increased then decreased with cycling; S15 showed highest plasticity; S70 showed 60% reduction to 0.8%

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: From R5 recycled powder. O content 680 ppm. Al 47.67 at.%.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 5 cycles. EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S5 processed from R5 powder.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Similar to S0 with equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed β₀/B₂ bright spots. Pronounced γ bands with annealed twins. β₀/B₂ content increased compared to S0.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; γ bands present; increased β₀/B₂

Composition_Info.Note: From R10 recycled powder. O content 730 ppm.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 10 cycles. EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S10 processed from R10 powder.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂). Pronounced γ bands with annealed twins similar to S0. Increased β₀/B₂ content.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; γ bands present; β₀/B₂ dispersoids

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: From R15 recycled powder. O content 740 ppm. Significant Al depletion (~1.5 at.% from initial). Critical degradation threshold.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 15 cycles. EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S15 processed from R15 powder. After 15 cycles, >93% powders irradiated by EB.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF from R15 recycled powder (>93% EB-irradiated)

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂). More pronounced lamellar clusters than S0. γ bands not pronounced in S15. β₀/B₂ content increased. LAGB 7.40%. Twin boundaries decreased. KAM max 4.99.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; pronounced lamellar clusters; β₀/B₂ at grain boundaries; no distinct γ bands

Properties_Info.Note: Highest plasticity due to elimination of large-scale γ-band structures and proliferation of twin boundaries

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: From R30 recycled powder. O content 860±10 ppm. Al 46.89±0.6 at.%. After 30 cycles, >99.6% powders irradiated by EB.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 30 cycles. EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S30 from R30 powder. After 30 cycles, >99.6% powder EB-irradiated.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF from R30 recycled powder (>99.6% EB-irradiated)

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) along boundaries and inside lamellar colonies. γ bands pronounced similar to S0. β₀/B₂ phase content increased. Bright spots grew larger and transformed from point-like to irregular agglomerations.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; β₀/B₂ agglomerates at boundaries and inside colonies; γ bands present

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: From R30b powder (after adding 10 kg fresh powder to R30). O content 760±15 ppm. Al 47.56±0.2 at.%. New powder comprised ~30.3% of mixture.

Process_Text.original: After 30 cycles, 10 kg fresh powder mixed with R30 powder (tilting mixer, 30 r/min, 30-45 min, inert gas). EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S30b from R30b powder. New powder ~30.3%.
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF from R30b (30% fresh powder addition)

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂). γ bands reappeared. Slightly reduced β₀/B₂ content compared to S30. Pronounced lamellar clusters.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; γ bands reappeared; reduced β₀/B₂

Composition_Info.Note: From R45 recycled powder. O content 900 ppm. Al 47.35 at.%. New powder proportion reduced to 2.4%.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 45 cycles (with 10 kg fresh powder added at R30). EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S45 from R45 powder. New powder ~2.4%. Irregular powder proportion >30%.

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂). γ bands barely visible. β₀/B₂ content increased; spheroidized and agglomerated.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Equiaxed γ + lamellar colonies; reduced γ bands; increased β₀/B₂ agglomerates

Measured_Composition.Measurement_Method: Titration (Al), ICP-AES (Cr, Nb); OH-300 oxygen analyzer (O)

Composition_Info.Note: From R70 recycled powder. O content 940±40 ppm. Al 47.04±0.5 at.%. New powder proportion reduced to 0.04%. Al content range 42.12-49.52 at.% (heterogeneous). Irregular powder >30%.

Process_Text.original: EIGA powder recycled 70 cycles (with 10 kg fresh powder added at R30). EB-PBF (Qbeam S200, 60 kV, 50 μm layer). Building temperature 900-1100°C. Thin-walled sample S70 from R70 powder. New powder ~0.04%. Irregular powder proportion >30%. Grain refinement from heterogeneous nucleation (Cr-rich aggregates, TiCr₂, Al₂O₃).
Process_Text.simplified: EB-PBF from R70 recycled powder (0.04% fresh); significant grain refinement

Process_Info.Equipment: Qbeam S200, Beijing Quick Beam Technology Co., Ltd.

Microstructure_Text.original: Equiaxed γ grains, fine lamellar colonies (α₂ + γ), and dispersed bright spots (β₀/B₂) at boundaries and inside γ bulk. γ bands barely visible. β₀/B₂ spots grew larger, transformed from point-like to irregular agglomerations. Grain refinement: over 60% grains <5 μm. LAGB 8.15%. Twin boundaries decreased to 5.61%. KAM max 4.99 with uneven distribution. More regions with high KAM.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Fibrous γ + lamellar colonies; fine grains <10 μm (60% <5 μm); β₀/B₂ agglomerates; reduced twin boundaries

Properties_Info.Note: From stress-strain curve; highest yield strength

Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: Highest tensile strength; brittle fracture in parallel specimens due to excessive O (>2000 ppm) and grain boundary embrittlement

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: at RT (298.15 K); strain rate 1×10⁻⁴ s⁻¹
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: 12 mm gauge length, 2 mm width, 1 mm thickness
Properties_Info.Note: 60% reduction from S0 (2.1%); brittle fracture observed in parallel specimens due to O enrichment and oxide dispersion

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: White light interferometry and contact profilometry
Properties_Info.Test_Specimen: Side surface of thin-walled S70
Properties_Info.Note: More fusion lines and abnormal convex points on surface
